task: sweep dirt to the short dustpan
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A robotic arm is positioned over a table with a long, thin broom and a short, wide dustpan. The broom has bristles at one end and a handle; the dustpan has a bowl and a handle. The dirt is a small pile on the table. STRATEGY - First, grasp the broom to sweep the dirt towards the dustpan. Then, release the broom and grasp the dustpan to collect the dirt. Failure modes include missing the dirt with the broom or dropping the dustpan. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the broom handle; Step 2 grasp the broom handle for control; Step 3 sweep the broom over the dirt; Step 4 release the broom; Step 5 grasp the dustpan handle; Step 6 transport the dustpan to collect the dirt.
Goal: any_in(dustpan, dirt); all_on(dustpan, table)
Scene: broom, dustpan, dirt, table
Step 1: reach(broom)
  affordance_region: the handle of the broom
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, broom, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, broom) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(broom)
  affordance_region: the handle of the broom
  contact: holding(broom) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(broom)
Step 3: sweep(broom)
  affordance_region: the bristles of the broom
  contact: surface_contact(broom, dirt) [progress]
  spatial: above(dirt, broom, 0.05) [progress]
  direction: sweep_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: surface_contact(broom, dirt)
Step 4: release(broom)
  affordance_region: the handle of the broom
  contact: released(broom) [completion]
  done_when: released(broom)
Step 5: grasp(dustpan)
  affordance_region: the handle of the dustpan
  contact: holding(dustpan) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(dustpan)
Step 6: transport(dustpan -> dirt)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the dirt
  spatial: above(dirt, dustpan, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(dustpan)
  done_when: above(dirt, dustpan, 0.05)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area on the dirt
